creator: as@tenoware.com
text:
FreeBSD-12.1, 2, 3 work perfectly fine. 12.4 panics on boot.

The image: FreeBSD-12.4-RELEASE-arm-armv7-WANDBOARD.img


U-Boot SPL 2022.04 (Nov 30 2022 - 03:27:09 +0000)
Trying to boot from MMC1
